frame_analyses.description: LapSim by surgical science logo display
Endoloop applicator visible with foam appendage target, circular inset shows close-up view
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper setup with target appendage positioned, dual view for educational clarity

frame_analyses.description: Loop being advanced from applicator toward foam appendage
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Controlled advancement of loop, maintaining applicator stability

frame_analyses.description: Loop positioned around base of foam appendage near marking
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Precise positioning at target zone, loop fully deployed around appendage

frame_analyses.description: Loop positioned around appendage with grasper holding loop suture
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper grasping of suture tail for controlled cinching

frame_analyses.description: Loop being tightened around appendage base
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Progressive tightening while maintaining position at marked line

frame_analyses.description: Scissors cutting excess suture tail after loop secured
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean cutting technique leaving appropriate tail length

confidence_rationale: This is an instructional/demonstration video, not a performance to be scored
technique_summary: Educational demonstration of proper endoloop technique showing all key phases from deployment through final cutting

demonstrated_techniques: Precise positioning around appendage at marked line
Proper grasping of suture tail for cinching
Clean cutting of excess suture tail
common_errors_addressed: Maintaining loop position at marked line during cinching
Avoiding over-tightening that could transect appendage
